generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "\"Motor current sensor that measures electrical current drawn by the motor\""
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentMQTT
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "\"Permanent magnet synchronous motor encoder mounted on the motor, reports angular position\""
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleMQTT
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "\"Gearbox encoder positioned behind the gearbox, reports angular position\""
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderAngleMQTT
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "\"Motor current data transmitted over MQTT\""
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "\"Motor encoder angle data transmitted over MQTT\""
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "\"Gearbox encoder angle data transmitted over MQTT\""
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"MATLAB Simulink model of the motor for simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"MATLAB Simulink model of the gearwheel for simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"MATLAB Simulink model of the gearbox for simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used in the simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"Stribeck friction model used in the simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"Dahl friction model used in the simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "\"LuGre friction model used in the simulation\""
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

// Derived Data from MQTT streams
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "\"Computed torque from motor current sensor\""
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DedicatedProcessingComponent_Enabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "\"Computed angular velocity from motor encoder angle\""
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DedicatedProcessingComponent_Enabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "\"Computed angular acceleration from motor encoder angle\""
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DedicatedProcessingComponent_Enabler
]

// Simulation traces
instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "\"Simulated motor output from Simulink\""
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "\"Simulated gearwheel output from Simulink\""
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "\"Simulated system output from Simulink\""
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderAngleMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_SimulationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysML_MBSE_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "\"MBSE using SysML for structural and functional modelling\""
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetModelAnalysisService
]

instance Simulink_SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "\"MATLAB Simulink for executing friction and motor simulations\""
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "\"Asset Administration Shell as the semantic interface\""
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelBasedControlInsightsService
]

instance MQTT_StreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "\"One‑way MQTT data streaming of sensor traces\""
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance DedicatedProcessingComponent_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "\"Dedicated component that ingests data traces and runs simulation\""
]

instance UnifiedDashboard_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "\"Unified dashboard for visualizing measured vs simulated joint behavior\""
    DTDFVocab:enables JointBehaviorVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "\"Real‑time friction identification and continuous refinement of white‑box and black‑box friction models\""
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionEstimationInsight, DeviationsBetweenSimAndActualInsight, ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance JointBehaviorVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "\"Visualization of measured versus simulated joint behaviour in a unified dashboard\""
    DTDFVocab:provides JointBehaviorVisualizationInsight, OpenJointBehaviorDashboardAction
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "\"Data aggregation, abstraction and traceability for enhanced understanding of joint friction\""
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceInsight
]

instance ModelBasedControlInsightsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "\"Provision of model‑based control insights to support motion accuracy\""
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenancePlanningInsight, ControllerTuningInsight, UpdateControllerParametersAction
]

instance AssetModelAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "\"Analysis of asset and model during the twinning process\""
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetModelInsight
]

// C10: Insights and Actions
instance JointFrictionEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Quantitative estimate of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous)\""
]

instance DeviationsBetweenSimAndActualInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Flag deviations between simulated and actual joint behaviour\""
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Insights enabling parameter updates for the robot controller\""
]

instance JointBehaviorVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Current state of the joint behavior visualization\""
]

instance DataTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Aggregated data traces for joint friction analysis\""
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Insights used for maintenance planning\""
]

instance ControllerTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Insights used to tune the robot controller\""
]

instance AssetModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "\"Insights into the asset and its structural model\""
]

instance UpdateControllerParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "\"Action to update controller parameters for improved motion accuracy\""
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OpenJointBehaviorDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "\"Action to open the joint behaviour dashboard\""
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operation‑time continuous real‑time data ingestion and online model updating with sub‑second processing intervals for friction identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Asset (MABI MAX first axis) → Engineering model (SysML) → Simulation models (Simulink) → Processing component (data ingestion and model execution) → Data traces (measurement & simulation) → Dashboard (visualization)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (ideal mechanical model), Manufacturing (actual asset), Operated (runtime monitoring and online model refinement). The digital shadow operates during the Operated stage and references models from the Design stage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi‑physics‑aware identification ensures friction models adapt to changes in load, temperature, and wear. Traceability of data points to their origin and processing chain is maintained. Validation is performed by comparing measured data traces against simulated traces from the integrated friction models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way MQTT streams from robot sensors to the processing component; data series aggregated in the digital shadow; communication follows MQTT over the internal industrial network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML, UML, Asset Administration Shell (AAS), MQTT, and reference models for digital shadows; adherence to standards for data connectivity and interoperability."
]
